name: Disadvantage
definition: If you have Disadvantage on a D20 Test, roll two d20s and use the lower roll.
full_text: If you have Disadvantage on a D20 Test, roll two d20s and use the lower roll. A roll can't be affected by more than one Disadvantage, and Advantage and Disadvantage on the same roll cancel each other.

mechanics.stacking: A roll can't be affected by more than one Disadvantage
mechanics.cancellation: Advantage and Disadvantage on the same roll cancel each other
